_comment: Hand-curated overrides per entity slug. The page renders without any of these — every field has a smart fallback in src/research/enrichment.py — but adding curated content makes the page noticeably better. Fields:  primary[] (always shown), adverse_media[] (prepended to live news), press_release_url (replaces the date-search deep link), narrative_override (replaces templated WHY paragraph), public_role (e.g. 'Director of Mining, Ministry of Petroleum').

saab-halabi-tarek-william.public_role: Attorney General of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela (Fiscal General de la República), appointed by the Constituent Assembly in August 2017. Not related to Alex Nain Saab Moran.
